description: Plan review workflow hooks: SessionStart injection, ExitPlanMode blocker, EnterPlanMode cleaner

hooks.command: if [ ! -f ./.plan-review/review-status.md ] || ! grep -q '\- \[x\] Have I reviewed this plan?' ./.plan-review/review-status.md; then echo 'BLOCKED: Plan review required. Launch plan-reviewer subagent (Agent tool, subagent_type: plan-reviewer), wait for completion, then retry ExitPlanMode.'; exit 1; fi
